changes.value:
Create README.md for shelltool-cli and integrate into the doc site.

## README.md
Follow swissarmyhammer-cli/README.md pattern:
- What shelltool is (standalone MCP shell tool for Claude Code)
- Install: `brew install swissarmyhammer/tap/shelltool-cli`
- Usage: `shelltool init`, `shelltool doctor`, `shelltool serve`
- What init does (registers MCP server, blocks Bash, deploys skill, creates config)
- Link to shell security config docs

## Doc site
- Add `- [ShellTool CLI](reference/shelltool-cli.md)` to doc/src/SUMMARY.md
- shelltool-cli.md is auto-generated by build.rs

## Acceptance
- README.md exists in shelltool-cli/
- doc/src/SUMMARY.md references shelltool-cli
- `cargo build -p shelltool-cli` generates doc/src/reference/shelltool-cli.md
